title: Thai Crumble Apple Caramel
description: A unique twist on traditional crumble with caramelized apples and a Slovakian twist.

ingredients.name: Caramelized apples
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade caramelized apples

instructions: Mix crumble topping ingredients in a bowl: flour, butter, brown sugar. Set aside.
Combine caramelized apples, coconut milk, cinnamon, cardamom in a separate bowl.
Transfer apple mixture to a baking dish.
Top apple mixture with crumble topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crumble topping is golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with additional coconut milk if desired.
Optional: garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or cardamom powder.
